docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR DISMISSAL W/O PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY MANRIQUEZ, ARACELI B. AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $130.00 SERVED OCT-08-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ARACELI B. MANRIQUEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
